pi_items.source: task.json description, setup_task.sh (line 17), seed_demodb.py (lines 52-58), and task_utils.sh (line 6)
task.json description: 'Create a new edge class named IsNearby'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh lines 17-18 and export_result.sh line 42
task.json description: 'Add a String property named Type to the IsNearby class'. Confirmed in export_result.sh line 42
task.json description: 'Set the Type property to same_city for all created edges'. Confirmed in export_result.sh line 42

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on 'demodb', a database included with OrientDB 3.2.36. The task requires creation of an 'IsNearby' edge class extending base class 'E' with a String property 'Type' set to value 'same_city'. Data is synthetic: 15 hotels and 11 restaurants across 11 cities (Rome, Berlin, Paris, London, New York, Tokyo, Sydney, Rio de Janeiro, Barcelona, Athens, Amsterdam) with real hotel/restaurant names seeded by seed_demodb.py script. Expected edge count is 14 (based on city-level cardinality: sum of hotel×restaurant pairs per city).
